hooks.command: PLIST="Sources/SmartInputSwitcher/Info.plist"; [ -f "$PLIST" ] || exit 0; LAST_MSG=$(git log -1 --pretty=%s 2>/dev/null); case "$LAST_MSG" in 'chore: bump build to '*) exit 0;; esac; CUR=$(awk '/<key>CFBundleVersion<\/key>/{getline; gsub(/.*<string>|<\/string>.*/,""); print; exit}' "$PLIST"); case "$CUR" in ''|*[!0-9]*) exit 0;; esac; NEW=$((CUR + 1)); awk -v new="$NEW" 'prev==1{sub(/<string>[0-9]+<\/string>/,"<string>" new "</string>"); prev=0} /<key>CFBundleVersion<\/key>/{prev=1} {print}' "$PLIST" > "$PLIST.tmp" && mv "$PLIST.tmp" "$PLIST"; git add "$PLIST" && git diff --cached --quiet "$PLIST" || git commit -q -m "chore: bump build to $NEW"; exit 0
